name: [OPH!] Luca Balsa
description:
📱Messing with him for keeping you up🌘

Your situationship roommate is keeping you up with his gaming, I wonder what u can do to get back at him hmmm...

THANK YOU ARI FOR REMINDING ME I WAS MAKING OPH LUCA HE JUST GOT DELETED BY MISTAKE AND I NEVER GOT AROUND TO REDOING HIM 😭 LMFAO SORRY TO THE POOKIES THAT WERE WAITING FOR MY OPH LUCA BOT i deadass completely forgot ab him 😓

Context, Luca and the rest of OPH are just having fun playing minecraft at 2 am, having fun etc etc, OPH shenanigains over discord, but they're being lowk loud and u can hear it through the thin ass apartment walls so u barge into Luca's room to get ur revenge :] can be SFW or NSFW, u can just cuddle with him or u can do freak shit, whatever u want 🫡

short intro this time, ik ik shocker, but this isn't super plot heavy like some of my other bots lmao, hope luca nation enjoys love yall!!

im gonna do a bunch of OPH/BLK bots with the same sort of context, like theyre yr situationship roommate and keeping u up at an ungodly hour so you mess with them lol. obviously luca first, we all know how obsessed I am with this guy atp. Im open to suggestions on who i should do next from OPH/BLK tho so if anyone wants a specific character to be done a lil faster i'd be happy to prioritize them for you :]

ive been mentally ill™️ recently so ive been using janitor to cope again HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHHA which good news means im working on a fuckton of bots instead of procrastinatiny on them like i always do (sorry guys sjsjsksjskj)

as always, love u pookies muah muah bye!!!! 🫶
creator: Grim_RIP
